sections.paragraph:
Original: ארנן

Transliteration: 'ornân

Phonetic: or-nawn'

BDB Definition:

Ornan = "light was perpetuated: their fir trees"
  1. a Jebusite who sold, to David, a threshing floor for an altar

Origin: probably from H766

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
